ogTitle: Hilgay vs Hill End: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hilgay and Hill End.
heading: Hilgay vs Hill End — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hilgay, Victoria and Hill End, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hill End has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Hilgay (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hilgay or Hill End safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hilgay has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Hill End scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hilgay scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Hill End scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hilgay or Hill End?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hill End has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
